sentences.target: J'ai entendu parler de l'attentat hier.

translations.fr: J'ai entendu parler de l'attentat hier.
translations.en: I heard about the attack yesterday.
translations.de: Ich habe gestern von dem Anschlag gehört.
translations.zh-Hans: 我昨天听说了那起袭击。
translations.yue: 我噚日聽到關於嗰單襲擊嘅消息。
translations.ru: Я вчера услышал об этом теракте.
translations.vi: Hôm qua tôi nghe tin về vụ tấn công.
translations.nl: Ik heb gisteren over de aanslag gehoord.
translations.hi: मैंने कल हमले के बारे में सुना।
translations.nb: Jeg hørte om angrepet i går.
translations.id: Kemarin saya mendengar tentang serangan itu.
translations.da: Jeg hørte om angrebet i går.
translations.ja: 昨日その襲撃について聞きました。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial word.
Auxiliary verb (present, 1st sg) forming the compound past (passé composé).
Past participle of the main lexical verb in a compound tense.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement to 'entendu' (entendre + infinitif).
Preposition introducing the prepositional complement.
Common noun (singular) with elided definite article 'l''; head of the PP 'de l'attentat'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Les infos parlent d'un attentat en ville.
sentences.reading: /lez ɛ̃fo paʁl dœ̃ atɑ̃ta ɑ̃ vil/

translations.fr: Les infos parlent d'un attentat en ville.
translations.ipa: /lez ɛ̃fo paʁl dœ̃ atɑ̃ta ɑ̃ vil/
translations.en: The news is talking about an attack in town.
translations.es: Las noticias hablan de un atentado en la ciudad.
translations.de: Die Nachrichten berichten von einem Anschlag in der Stadt.
translations.it: I notiziari parlano di un attentato in città.
translations.ko: 뉴스에서 시내의 테러 소식을 전하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 新闻在报道市内的一起袭击。
translations.yue: 新聞報道市內有宗襲擊。
translations.ru: В новостях говорят о теракте в городе.
translations.pt: Os noticiários falam de um atentado na cidade.
translations.vi: Tin tức đang nói về một vụ tấn công trong thành phố.
translations.ar: الأخبار تتحدث عن هجوم في المدينة.
translations.nl: Het nieuws bericht over een aanslag in de stad.
translations.uk: У новинах говорять про теракт у місті.
translations.hu: A hírek a városban történt merényletről szólnak.
translations.hi: खबरों में शहर में हुए हमले की बात हो रही है.
translations.pl: W wiadomościach mówią o zamachu w mieście.
translations.el: Στις ειδήσεις μιλούν για επίθεση στην πόλη.
translations.nb: Nyhetene melder om et angrep i byen.
translations.id: Berita mengabarkan tentang serangan di kota.
translations.sv: Nyheterna rapporterar om en attack i staden.
translations.ro: Știrile vorbesc despre un atentat în oraș.
translations.cs: Ve zprávách mluví o útoku ve městě.
translations.da: Nyhederne rapporterer om et angreb i byen.
translations.ja: ニュースで市内での襲撃について伝えています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (plural) agreeing with 'infos'.
Plural common noun (colloquial for 'informations'); subject of 'parlent'.
3rd person plural present of the main verb.
Contraction of preposition 'de' and indefinite article 'un' introducing a nominal complement.
Singular common noun; complement of 'd''.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en'.

translations.zh-Hans: 人们担心今天会发生袭击。
translations.tr: Bugün bir saldırı olmasından endişe ediliyor.
translations.vi: Mọi người lo sợ sẽ có một vụ tấn công hôm nay.
translations.ar: هناك خشية من وقوع هجوم اليوم.
translations.nb: I dag frykter man et angrep.
translations.id: Hari ini dikhawatirkan akan ada serangan.
translations.sv: I dag fruktar man en attack.
translations.ro: Astăzi există temeri privind un atentat.
translations.da: I dag frygter man et angreb.
translations.ja: 今日は襲撃が懸念されています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal pronoun used as subject.
3rd person singular present of the main verb.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determiner of 'attentat'.
Singular common noun; direct object of 'craint'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Je déteste parler d'attentat devant les enfants.
sentences.reading: /ʒə detɛst paʁle datɑ̃ta dəvɑ̃ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je déteste parler d'attentat devant les enfants.
translations.ipa: /ʒə detɛst paʁle datɑ̃ta dəvɑ̃ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/
translations.en: I hate talking about an attack in front of the kids.
translations.es: Odio hablar de atentados delante de los niños.
translations.de: Ich hasse es, vor den Kindern über Anschläge zu sprechen.
translations.it: Odio parlare di attentati davanti ai bambini.
translations.ko: 아이들 앞에서 테러 이야기를 하는 게 싫어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我讨厌在孩子面前谈论袭击。
translations.yue: 我唔鍾意喺小朋友面前講襲擊嘅事。
translations.ru: Я ненавижу говорить о терактах при детях.
translations.pt: Detesto falar de atentados na frente das crianças.
translations.he: אני שונא לדבר על פיגועים מול הילדים.
translations.tr: Çocukların yanında saldırılardan bahsetmekten nefret ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi ghét nói về các vụ tấn công trước mặt bọn trẻ.
translations.ar: أكره التحدث عن الهجمات أمام الأطفال.
translations.nl: Ik haat het om over aanslagen te praten in het bijzijn van de kinderen.
translations.uk: Ненавиджу говорити про теракти при дітях.
translations.hu: Utálok a gyerekek előtt merényletekről beszélni.
translations.hi: मुझे बच्चों के सामने हमलों के बारे में बात करने से नफरत है.
translations.pl: Nienawidzę rozmawiać o zamachach przy dzieciach.
translations.el: Μισώ να μιλάω για επιθέσεις μπροστά στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Jeg hater å snakke om angrep foran barna.
translations.id: Saya benci membicarakan serangan di depan anak-anak.
translations.sv: Jag avskyr att prata om attacker framför barnen.
translations.ro: Urăsc să vorbesc despre atentate în fața copiilor.
translations.cs: Nesnáším mluvit o útocích před dětmi.
translations.da: Jeg hader at tale om angreb foran børnene.
translations.ja: 子どもたちの前で襲撃の話をするのは嫌いです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
1st person singular present of the main verb.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement to 'déteste'.
Common noun governed by preposition 'de' elided to 'd''; bare complement without an article.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (plural) determiner of 'enfants'.
Common noun (plural); object of 'devant'.
